summary: Image-required op guard (enqueue-time media validation) + Reuse-Prompt image gating for no-input-image sources. Surfaced by NVIDIA PiD upscaler (first image-only model). Created directly in doing/validating — code shipped + reuse gating/enqueue toast live-verified this session; uncommitted.

Numbering correction: earlier code comments + coordination message mistakenly used MPI-211 (an unrelated existing card: Blob-404 on Stop). All 9 code refs + the message rewritten to MPI-212. Related queue-drain bug (completed PiD job not draining from Cue) handed to MPI-208 via message 6d4e3f09.

doing/validating -> done/complete/accepted. User-accepted (reuse image gating + enqueue toast live-verified this session). Committing code by explicit pathspec. Candidate #1 (this guard) ruled out of the MPI-213 stuck-drain by code review + acknowledged by that owner.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
